Ambassador of the Islamic Republic of Iran to India
In an interview with a reporter:
The reporter uses the word "Gulf Region" in his question:
Ambassado: what???
second time
Gulf...?
Persian Gulf.
Reporter: Persian...
Ambassador: Persian Gulf.
The ambassador does not let the reporter continue his question until he repeats it several times:
Persian Gulf.
Don't forget:
Persian Gulf. 😄

The world has witnessed Iran’s tolerance and conciliation. What is being done under the guise of a naval blockade is an extension of military operations against a nation paying the price for its resistance and independence. Continuation of this oppressive approach is intolerable.

Under the "permitted to publish" clause, Israeli outlet Maariv reported that an Israeli occupation soldier from the 13th Battalion of the Golani Brigade operating under the 7th Brigade’s combat team was killed, and wounded 15 others after Hezbollah launched a series of explosive drone strikes targeting the forces. 

According to the report, the Resistance "successfully carried out a precise strike, hitting an artillery battery," killing the soldier and triggering secondary explosions after a drone struck a vehicle carrying shells. 

The attack also left another soldier moderately wounded in the same incident, while additional strikes across different sectors injured several others, including one seriously and another moderately, from Division 91. 

Maariv added that Hezbollah launched an explosive drone toward a vehicle known as "Alpha", which carried shells belonging to the artillery battery.

The strike caused secondary explosions that intensified the damage to the artillery battery. Two soldiers were moderately wounded, and 10 others sustained light injuries.

Press Statement by the Embassy of the Islamic Republic of Iran on the fabricated negative media environment in the United Kingdom

The Embassy of the Islamic Republic of Iran in London reaffirms its position in unequivocally condemning terrorism in all its forms and manifestations, including recent incidents within the United Kingdom.
The Embassy of the Islamic Republic of Iran categorically rejects any allegations or link of Iran’s involvement in violent activities or incidents in the United Kingdom. Such baseless accusations against Islamic Republic of Iran, lack credible evidence and appear to serve narrow political agendas and to mislead public opinion and distract from the real root causes of terrorism and violent extremism.
As a nation that has been a primary victim of terrorism for decades, enduring the loss of hundred thousands innocent citizens, high-ranking officials and scientists, Iran remains at the forefront of the global struggle against terrorism and violent extremism.
It is therefore regrettable that some western countries, while claiming to combat terrorism, have effectively become safe havens for terrorists that their hands are polluted to the Iranian blood and their members, continue to spread extremist and violent ideologies in Europe.
The Embassy also notes that, in previous official communications and discussions, it had raised concerns with relevant authorities about certain suspicious activities and the potential exploitation of “false flag” operations on UK soil.
The Embassy of the Islamic Republic of Iran reiterates that effectively addressing threats requires mutual cooperation grounded in trust and credible evidence.
Embassy of the Islamic Republic of Iran

London –  30 April 2026

On April 30, the National Day of the Persian Gulf, and in the face of the imposed war, cruel U.S. sanctions, and economic siege, the Iranian people have proven that dignity is not negotiable and independence is not for sale. Those who sought to break Iran through blockade and coercion have only strengthened our resolve. The Persian Gulf stands as a testament to resistance, sacrifice, and the unshakable will of a nation that bows to no power.

Amazon said on Thursday that damage to its cloud infrastructure in Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates during the war on Iran has disrupted its ability to support customer applications.

Its cloud division, Amazon Web Services, added that billing operations in both regions have been suspended while efforts are underway to restore normal services, a process expected to take several months.

Iran had previously issued warnings to Amazon during the war over its cooperation with the Israeli military, particularly through Project Nimbus, which provides technology to the IOF, further enabling their crimes.

#Iran #WarOnIran #Amazon #Gulf #AlMayadeen

In an interview for Al Mayadeen, Professor Mohammad Marandi said that he does not think #Iran wants to change mediators, explaining that the problem is with the US, not the mediators. 

As for Iran's relationship with #Oman, Professor Marandi noted that they have a very good relationship, explaining that Oman did not participate in this war like other #Gulf states.

"So obviously, Iran has good relations with Oman, and it will discuss relations with countries in the region, as well as the situation with the United States, with Oman because they have experience with the #UnitedStates and they have longstanding relations with countries in the region," Professor Marandi said. 

He also noted that Iran and Oman share the Strait of Hormuz, adding that they need to coordinate on a host of different issues.

@s_m_marandi 

#IranWar #WarOnIran
